## Purpose

Describe the measurement-design or evidence problem this change addresses.

## Boundaries checked

- [ ] Reliability is not presented as construct validity.
- [ ] Exploratory structure remains labeled exploratory.
- [ ] Cross-wave or group means are withheld without declared invariance evidence.
- [ ] Automated item deletion was not introduced.
- [ ] No proprietary course or private third-party material was copied.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff passes.
- [ ] Documentation and fictional examples are updated.
